data.content: Shipment review rejected. The shipped retry behavior, strict alternate-agent selection, main-branch merge (bc1963b82eca), commit tags, and CI runs are all in place, but the new outcome telemetry is incorrect: on error exit, terminal-manager stores rolledBack=true whenever enforceQueueTerminalInvariant() returns true, which includes the no-op case where the beat is already in a valid queue/terminal state. This misstates the detailed agent outcome record the feature is meant to persist. Targeted tests passed for agent-outcome stats, strict pool exclusion, and terminal-manager abort behavior, but there is no regression test covering the non-rollback error-exit path.
